reviews.review_text: Small well appointed CP walk to town, powered sites, dump point, laundry well appointed camp kitchen

If you’d like to visit the Blue Mountains, this campsite is ideal! It’s located close to the best walking tracks, which makes your stay much easier. Many thanks to the lady we met at reception, she was very kind and gave us excellent advice on which walks to do. Don’t hesitate to take the information sheet about all the tracks; it’s very well explained and really practical. We absolutely loved our stay here!

Beautiful bush setting and a nice, quiet atmosphere. However, $70 for an unpowered site felt overpriced. Amenities were clean but quite dated and located a fair walk from the campsite. Nice walk up a steep hill into town, for an enjoyable dinner at the pub.

The bathrooms need a good scrub and the toilets need more attention more often and the sites aren’t mowed. There were noisy campers until midnight for two nights. Great location but I don’t think it’s worth $70 a night.
What a unique and lovely little park. Awesome service from Daniel who helped us when our caravan malfunctioned and got us a cabin for our stay.
Stayed in our own caravan  . Bathroom facilities  adequate and heated !!
Outstanding service and support of a school Duke of Edinburgh group. Clean and comfortable camping areas with matching amenities. Great location for day hikes.

Was very disappointed with managements decision at this site, booked in approx Nov 2025, for a van trip down to Sydney then to here,  then onto Bathurst and continue onto other towns. We are a Retired couple, i rang them and said due to the fuel crisis going on (lack of fuel and cost) we wanted to cancel for now. They replied ok, and you will lose $25 of your deposit due to school holidays. We leave on the morning of the 4th April so not in school holidays but they refer to their paperwork, if in 2 weeks of school holidays you lose this. Two other van parks we booked had no issue due to whats happening. You don't get the info/paperwork stating this until you book & pay a deposit. We didn't cancel for a weak reason, maybe they don't get the news up there and see whats happening in the state. So just a heads up if you intend to stay here, be aware of their conditions of staying.
Tucked away in the Blue Mountains, lots of Cockatoos to wake you up early.  Nice kitchen area.  Unfortunately no soap or hair dryers in ladies room.

Overpriced at $80 for a powered site for 2a2c with no real offerings for kids and cold showers.
Very tired caravan park needs alot of work and cleaning +++ to be charging these sort of prices
Cold showers on 3 out of 4 times using them.
Amenities not cleaned well enough in my opinion! Grime inside showers
Camp kitchen fridge was dirty inside and filthy on top
Bbqs were good in camp kitchen
Dryers with dog hair inside

We played half the price to stay at a council run park in woollongong and was cleaner and again in bathurst $25 and amenities were clean hot showers etc

Location is great and this park could very well be great it just needs some updating

Also if allowing dogs and having rules actually need to police them
We had a caravan with a dogs next to us and constant yapping!

The location is great l, across from park and close walk to town and train and pubs!

Staff were friendly

Had a little staycation here Sunday and Monday night.
A great place for a reset.
Centrally located for everything you need.
Bush walks, local swimming pool and the pubs, shops and train station in walking distance. A great place to use as a base.
I stayed in a cabin which was clean and comfortable. Sheets fresh and towels fluffy.
Water temp and pressure was great.
Even though this place was pretty full it was very quiet with no grey nomads partying on ‘til dark.

Es ist ein sehr schöner Campingplatz. Der Platz ist ruhig, viel Grün und  total entspannt. Die Sanitäranlagen sind d sauber und ordentlich, da es auch im Sommer recht kalt werden sind sogar Wärmelampen angebracht die richtig gut funktionieren. 👍 |Die Nähe zu den Blue Mountains ist genial. |Es hätte von uns 5 Punkte gegeben, leider sind wir etwas enttäuscht von der unflexiblen Dame im Office. Wir haben unseren Platz um 3 Tage verlängert, super dass war kein Problem. Allerdings mussten wir alles abbauen und 40 m weiter fahren und alles wieder aufbauen. Unseren Nachbarn mit Caravan ging es genau so, für einen Tag. Nur als Tipp, ein Caravan ist mit mehr Arbeit auf- und abzubauen als ein Wohnmobil. Es besteht hier kein ersichtlichen Grund einer unbedingten Platzzuweisung. Dann hätte es Lob und 5 Punkte gegeben.  Nur als Tipp um es anderen Reisenden einfacher zu machen. Trotzdem war es sehr schön und es gibt eine 100% Weiterempfehlung.

Blackheath Caravan Park is a charming, well-kept park in a great location. We spent five nights here and found it to be quaint, peaceful, and very well serviced. The facilities were excellent and clearly well maintained, and the park is within easy walking distance of plenty of shops, cafés, and restaurants, which made everything incredibly convenient. A great base for exploring the Blue Mountains — we’d happily stay again.
Great location, well kept and good facilities.

We stayed here over the Christmas break and had a really lovely experience. The park is in a great location and the facilities are very well equipped and well maintained, making it an easy and comfortable place to stay. They have exceptional customer service. After we’d left, I realised I’d accidentally left some belongings behind, and the staff went completely out of their way to help locate them and very kindly post them back to me. Communication was quick, friendly, and incredibly helpful throughout. It’s rare to come across such thoughtful and responsive service—thank you again for your kindness. I wouldn’t hesitate to stay here again and highly recommend this park to others.
Very clean and awesome staff
Loverly quiet campsite, clean showers and facilities, and in a good location for the tourist attractions the blue Mountains offers
Camping très agréable et proche de beaucoup de randonnées. Surtout grand merci aux propriétaires qui nous ont bien aidé avec notre van en panne.   Encore merci. Flo et Lo

Un des moins tape à l'œil, un des moins chers et un des meilleurs lors de notre séjour de 30j en camping car entre Brisbane et Sydney.
Accueil sympathique, toutes les commodités souhaitées, emplacements à l'ombre, ou pas...
Ambiance à l'image du reste, une des meilleures de notre séjour.
Les plus belles balades effectuées et toutes à proximité.
Attention, nombre de places moindre que dans les "chaînes", pensez à réserver à l'avance !
Nous recommandons vivement !

I stayed in a tent here and it's nice and quiet since it's set back from the road. You can also walk up to Blackheath village or try one of the many hiking trails from here. It's a welcome relief from Sydney.

BETTER RECYCLING PLEASE!
Everything was amazing here, the place feels as though some pride goes into it. Well looked after and cared for. Would love to see some more effort go into recycling, I feel like having one big bin of each colour would do the job.

Thank you so much to Angela and Daniel for their wonderful hospitality and facilities. Myself, my partner and our friends stayed in two of their glamping tents and they had thought of everything! We also required attention to an external issue, of which they were easily contactable and was resolved within 5 mins. We’ll be back soon!

A fabulous stay! A great park with warm welcome from Daniel and his wife. Great facilities and lots of thoughtful additions - heaters on in the amenities block. All amenities spotless. Camp kitchen really well stocked and whole park is well presented and maintained. Rates about the most reasonable we have come across. So glad to have found this gem. Thank you

Als Ausgangspunkt für Wanderungen in den Blue Mountains gut geeignet.
Der Campground hat ebene, ausreichend große Stellplätze mit Strom, Wasser, Greywater. Die Dame v. der Reception hat uns freundlicherweise ausgeholfen mit einer Stromkabel-Verlängerung und einem Adapter  für den Wasseranschluss (Gewinde)! ++
Die Campingküche was groß und umfangreich ausgestattet.
Waschräume und Toiletten waren sehr sauber, hatten warmes Wasser und das Beste bei nur 3° C Temperatur am Morgen: es gab richtig gute Wärmestrahler!!!
Staff were super accommodating. Camp grounds were great and the heaters in the bathrooms were much appreciated

Wij zijn hier een paar dagen gebleven met een camper. Hele vriendelijke behulpzame eigenaren! Wc en douches goed schoon en in de ochtend en avond verwarmd heerlijk!! Mooie wandelingen kun je hier maken. Ook dichtbij is de trein en de bus welke in Australië heel goedkoop zijn. Treinrit heen en terug Katoomba $1.
Wel van te voren boeken want het is de enige camping hier een andere is in Katoomba en die is ook snel vol.
We ended up here by chance and stayed for one day. The place is very peaceful, with clean bathrooms and kitchen. The Wi-Fi wasn’t very strong, but it was fine for a short stay.

Great camping spot for our campervan. Limited spots available so book in advance. They have a lot of the ensuite sites available at a higher price so when the campsite is booked up quickly, you may be left with only the expensive ensuite sites left. It was well worth the expense with very plush inside that has been redone recently. One camp kitchen for the small site. Very good facilities. One toilet block. A good EZ dump point.

We camp in the unpowered section usually. It's reasonably quiet and has some shade.
It's a campground not a hotel.

Notre séjour dans ce camping a été excellent, les douches sont propres et chaudes, le lieu est à taille humaine. Il y a même une cuisine et des planchas ! L'employée qui nous a accueillis a été très amicale, et de bon conseil.

Nice caravan and tenting park. Dog friendly.
Facilities clean and tidy.
Infra red heating in the toilets, very cosy.
Once we sold our van, wehave been seeking the same pleasures in park cabins.  Bansia Cabin in the Blackheath  "Glen C.P"  was the most pleasant we have encountered and we thoroughly recommend it!
Beautiful dog friendly caravan park. Great facilities, superior camp kitchen with lots of green space around each site. Ensuite sites also available

68$ per Night for a muddy unpowered site is ridiculously rude! Besides the price it is a normal and quiet campground with clean amenities. Common area and camp kitchen was overtaken both evenings from 7pm onwards by a Student group which was unfortunate and selfish but had nothing to do with the campground itself. Wifi was good in the Common Space as well.

Wir waren auf diesem Campingplatz für 2 Nächte. Wir sind nach 5pm angereist und haben die CheckIn Informationen freundlicherweise per Mail erhalten. Am nächsten Morgen kam jemand vorbei und hat sich nach unserem Aufenthalt erkundigt - sehr nett!
Die Sanitären Einrichtungen waren zwar was in die Jahre gekommen aber in einem sauberen Zustand und beheizt (wir waren Mitte September dort).
Unser Stellplatz hatte sowohl Wasser- und Stromanschluss, als auch einen eigenen Abwasserabfluss.
Direkt vor dem Eingang des Campingplatzes war ein Kinderspielplatz.
Zusätzlich hatten wir guten Wifi Empfang.
Wir wollten die Grand Canyon Wanderung in den Blue Mointains machen, diese war 12 Minuten entfernt. - also hatte der Campingplatz die perfekte Lage für uns! Gerne wieder!
We stayed here in our caravan. A quiet location not far from the main street. Very clean and staff very helpful.
We were there for only two nights, we would like to stay there longer. It is a great location.
The got seriously everything… best campground I ever visited. The owners are very lovely and always ready to help. They really know their stuff.

Very clean and tidy park with excellent staff|Couldn’t believe the toilets and showers are all heated! Lovely setting in a quiet location with an amazing park across the road with the restored playground that I remember playing on when I visited as a child

El glamping era muy limpio, hacía frío así que recomiendo traer más cobijas para el invierno, las instalaciones son muy buenas, tienen cocina y comedor amplio, los baños tienen calefacción y es maravilloso.
Lovely caravan park with exceptionally clean, updated amenities blocks and well stocked camp kitchen. Very friendly and knowledgeable reception staff and caretakers.

Great one night stay at an unpowered site. Very clean amenity block with high pressure hot showers and flushing toilets. Nice and spacious campers kitchen. Close to blue mountains and definitely check out the mermaid cave walk while you’re in the area, only a 7 minute drive away.

The staff is super friendly and helpful! The kitchen is quite big and has everything that you need. But the best part are the bathrooms!!! I never had such a joy going to the amenities. They had heaters at the toilets and the showers. At night it was quite cold, but after a hot shower you come out and you get heated by the heaters and even your clothes are already warm when you left them on the bench. And my favourite part are the toilets. Even there you have the heaters. So when it is cold you have a heater heating you while being on the toilet. This makes you never want to leave the amenities. A brilliant idea, I love it!!! ❤️

Caravan Park is great. During winter, try get a spot that gets some sun. Northern side of park is in shade most/all day. Great people running the place and shower facilities are heated. Can get freaky cold here.
Great clean cabins will stay again

This is always a great experience. The owners of the park are super friendly and easy to speak to. The caravan sites are large and easy to back into. The ensuite and other bathroom facilities are super clean. Whilst the park is aging the service is excellent. Well done guys, we will see you next year.

This was our first visit , came for a family gathering over easter.  There were 4 adults in the 3 bedroom cabin I am reviewing.
The pros: Lovely location, enjoyed the beautiful autumn trees outlook from our cabin, which had a nice large deck.
Friendly , helpful on-site staff.
Walking distance to Blackheath.

Cons: cleanliness not up yo scratch had to clean fridge, also too small for when you are cooking in. We had to buy ice in for an esky due to fridge having missing/  no door storage for bottles. Informed staff they said previous guests broke it, not sure how long ago that was though.
Lounges were very worn, sagging, very dirty under cushions when we tried to see why we kept sinking.
The lounge coverings so dirty we ended up putting a blanket over them to sit on - very uncomfortable.  Tiny TV  📺 that only had a few free to air channels, that kept pillaging. Staff did come and assist with that, but it shortly reverted back to unwatchable.
I wouldn't recommend for 4 adults, it was  cramped and bathroom / toilet combined meant often using  the communal facilities.

Next to no bench area to prepare or cook in kitchen, constantly bumping into each other as area so small when trying to cook.  Maybe a young family would be okay here, as the 3rd bunk room was quite large and kids would have room to play in it. The living area is tiny compared to other cabins we've stayed in.
These are mainly minor annoyances,  but I think the council should spend some money, get proper cleaning throughout,  and replace those terrible old past their use by dates dirty lounges.

Overall we had fun with family here, but disappointed in the accommodation.

The family members camping were quite happy as they brought their own gear and grounds are quite nice.
Awesome place to park the van or motorhome. Lots of tents also.
Great caravan park in excellent location. Nice spacious sites and well priced too. Facilities are a bit dated but were clean and maintained. Had a great stay.
Great place to camp, will be back to explore more. Stayed in an unpowered site, utilities were great, I loved the heaters
Loved this quiet caravan park. Toilets old but always clean. Amazing camp kitchen.

Beautiful place,
good camp kitchen and clean amenities.
Nice camp spots with plenty of room. Would definitely visit again

Wir hatten einen Ensuite Stellplatz. Die Dusche und Toilette waren sauber aber wurden während unseres 4 tätigen Aufenthaltes nicht gereinigt. Diesem sollte man sich bewusst sein. Da es allerdings das eigene Bad ist sollte man, genau wie in den öffentlichen Einrichtungen auch, persönlich auf Sauberkeit achten.

Der Campingplatz ist der perfekte Ort um die Blue Mountains mit dem Camper zu besuchen.
Eine Möglichkeit zum einkaufen für Getränke wäre sinnvoll wurde aber von der Stadt nicht genehmigt. Das soll mal einer verstehen….
Vor dem Campingplatz ist ein schöner Spielplatz für Kinder und die Straße ist sehr ruhig und wenig befahren.
Nachts hört man nichts außer ab und zu einen Zug.

Great caravan park, in a great little town/village.  Terrific receptionist, good sized sites (im a 28 foot motorhome - no problems in/out around park), facilities were neat, clean and tidy, all round friendly and a very pleasant stay.  Great base to explore the Blue Mountains from. We'll be back for sure... your showers were so good ...

We arrived last minute and we were squeezed in, which saved us a lot of hassle.   A quiet, clean and tidy site.   Daniel even helped us with an awning malfunction too.  Thanks again, we highly recommend the site  👍

Popular tourist area so priced accordingly. Large concrete slabs on powered sites but not level. Annoying that they have put down light gravel on the awning areas because all you do is walk it inside. Access roads inside the park are narrow making for tight site access for vans larger than 18’.

Nice and quiet, even when full. We stayed in the older chalet, well maintained and clean. Had all we needed for a 4-night stay, a wide verandah that overlooked the bush. Shopping in the village was good with butcher, baker groceries (and a candle stick maker!). Petrol price was good.|Staff very welcoming, and special thanks for the advice as to walking and outlook spots away from the Katoomba buses! Thanks for putting on the sunny weather!

A small and tidy Van park ideally suited and situated for those who want to explore Blackheath, Katoomba, Leura and the upper Blue Mountains.  Van sites are adequate.  Camp Kitchen is new'ish and well appointed.  Bathroom facilities are old but clean and adequate.  Park managers are friendly.  In all, great place for a weekend or extended weekend.
Ideal living space for money, friendly people and amazing tourist spot. Blue mountains very close by.

Stayed one night in our campervan on an unpowered site and it was great. Facilities clean and in amazing condition within close proximity of our pitch which was amazing for the mid night dash to the toilet! Lots of facilities for dish washing, clothes washing. BBQ areas etc.||Had sun in the evening till quite late and first thing in the morning. ||Great local surroundings. Found a good bush walk from the campsite which was 1.5hrs - amazing views and different terrains. Also a nearby pool which was lovely to take advantage of.||Clean, quiet and great location away from the busy Katoomba.

Nice and quiet, they have a 10pm curfew and people seem to respect it. The after hours check in was easy and the woman at the front desk is lovely. HIGHLY recommend the ensuite sites, such a good idea.
Great campground with lots of spaces and great facilities. Quite pricey (91$ for five people, non-powered site) and old buildings. Kitchen did not have many tools for communal use.

Great park which is central to lots of great towns, hiking and experiences nearby.  The amenities are very clean. The owners are lovely and attend to any issues immediately. Nice park and swimming pool just across the road and a variety of eateries in town.
Helpful and nice staff at the reception. Showers and toilets are clean and in general a beautiful and quiet camping ground.
Beautiful look after park with green geass ideal place for kids and picnics
Clean and good location

The check in was very easy and the staff were very pleasant.  The park is very convenient to most of the popular hikes in the Blue Mountains, especially Govetts Leap and the view of the Bridal Veil waterfall.  The park itself was clean and tidy and only a short walk into Blackheath.

Whilst the park is conveniently located to numerous hikes in the blue mountains, the grounds are poorly maintained with overgrown grass and knee height weeds throughout. The amenities are well upkept, however if you’re camping or using an unpowered site you are thrown down the bottom next to a mozzie filled creek and a fair walk to amenities. $42 for an unpowered site is quite steep.

Really lovely location, very rustic and close to all the tourist spots. It’s certainly an aging park, the amenities are very old, however exceptionally clean and heaters were appreciated in the morning. The staff are super friendly.

Mega schöner Campingplatz in den Blue Mountains! Der Platz ist wunderbar ruhig und ordentlich. Das Waschhaus sehr sauber und schön. Und dazu die Mitarbeiterin am Empfang wunderbar! So unglaublich nett, freundlich und hilfsbereit. Danke!
Took the caravan here for a weekend getaway. Great sites. Clean showers/toilets with space-heaters for the colder months! Friendly, helpful staff.

Great place to stay, friendly staff always smiling and able to answer questions or have a chat with.  Park facilities are kept in good and clean condition.

Has a fantastic park across the road if you have children they will love the play area and the very large open air swimming pool area with 3 pools to use all within the 25m from the caravan park
quiet and out of the way, only a small park but has everytrhing you need. Clean amenities, camp kitchen is all but new. Staff were lovely.
Unfortunately only a not powered site available. Amenities clean but a little bit old. Staff friendly! Not too expensive.

Staff friendly and helpful. Perfect place to stay to visit across Blue Mountains. Easy distance from Katoomba and Lithgow areas. Lots of space in allocated bay for caravan and car. Amenities good and clean. Not too large a park and quiet. Great park over the road for kids.
Great clean tents, reasonably priced and excellent shared amenities that are clearly very well kept

Tent holiday. Good site, well located.
Noise from the camp kitchen was a problem the first night. The kitchen was packed with a big group the first night we stayed. It turns out many in the group had their own kitchen facilities in their cabins but chose to use the communal kitchen so they could cook and eat together. Perhaps we should have asked to use their unoccupied cabins to make a cup of tea or wash dishes. They were polite though.

The staff were very friendly and polite. It's a good holiday option, well located and within a one minute walk of the playground.

Great location, close to some nice easy walking trails. Took the kids to the Popes Glen track which starts just behind the park area.

Good and clean amenities. Toilets have warm heater and the showers have hot water.  There is a kids playground just at the entrance of the park.

The town center is less than a 5 minute drive in case you want to eat there.

Overall well maintained park. Only issue I had was that the toilets had a very strong odour.

Camping super bien placé pour les nombreux départs de randonnées.
Le camping possède des douches CHAUDES! Toilettes, cuisine bien entretenues, très agréable !
Awesome place.  Easy and close to everything.
Great clean, simple, well set out caravan park. I had a tent and two kids and a lovely powered site with enough grass to make a home for a few days. Great location for walks and tourist attractions.
Friendly staff and a great place to explore the blue mountains from
Absolutely Amazing caravan park will definitely come back and Amazing stuff!!

Thanks to a lovely & helpful staff member named Allison, we were able to book for our family get together for Xmas period for  accommodation without any bother, Thanks so much, we appreciate that.  :)

The grassy hill with a rocket and plane have been transformed into a discovery park with sandstone pathways, embedded crystals and water play equipment. There is also a spacious and clean toilet block right near the carpark and entrance.

The Banksia cabin is nice and cozy theres a small cooking area where u can cook and also if you have a car u can park right outside your cabin (there will be a parking lot) really good location and really nice place to be

We had a great stay at Blackheath Glen Tourist Park. We booked one of the tents, however due to the very cold weather this weekend we were kindly offered one of the cabins instead. We had a very comfortable night in the Wattle Cabin with air conditioning and an ensuite. We will definitely stay again!

Great location for walks and trains. Excellent powered sites and service.|Thanks Alison. Pleasant walk through the park shops and services. Govetts Leap, Grand Canyon, Evan’s lookout short drive away. Popes  walking track links from caravan park to to national park. Lots of space for non powered sites.
A very well run council park . Friendly staff great location with clean amenities.  Sites can be a bit tight but manageable. Very quick place to explore the Blue mountains.

We stayed in a glamping tent. The tent had a substantial amount of mould on the walls of the tent. We felt unsafe to sleep in the tent due to this. As we went to bed, i couldn’t stop coughing and my throat starting closing up. We contacted the owner to let them know that the condition of the tent is unacceptable. He offered us a refund however he did not attempt to accommodate us further. We had to sleep in the car due to this and end our trip early. This really ruined our trip. I would not recommend this facility.
Nice and cozy camping. Not to big. Lady from the reception was very kind to us to borrow a blanket for the upcoming cold night. Thanks! Good location to visit the blue mountain lookouts.

Great location for a relaxing getaway, close to Balckheath township with good options for food and entertainment plus close to several hiking tracks and spectacular views of the Blue Mountains. Unpowered site right on the edge of 'Popes Glen creek'. The park was full but everyone was friendly, amenities were clean and lovely hot showers after a cool night.  Thank you for a great stay.
Staff were very friendly and helpful. Amenities are clean and the location is very central to look outs and tourist attractions. Will definitely stay here again.
The park is conveniently located, the showers are hot and clean and the staff are friendly. Kitchen is lacking fundamentals such as cutlery or plates and is really just a place to boil water.

Die Dame an dem check in war sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit. Sie hat definitiv 5 Sterne verdient.

Der Campingplatz hat alles gehabt was wir brauchen. Heiße duschen, Waschmaschine die 4 Dollar gekostet haben, saubere Toiletten.

Danke!

Powered site was good. Ladies amenities block was only cleaned once in the 5 nights we stayed. Even saw a red back spider in one of the toilet cubicles. A lack of attention to detail in cleaning the amenities block. I think the cabins received higher priority for cleaning than the general amenities block.

Rented out a small cabin, perfect for the large group we were, could easily fit everyone comfortably. Loved the patio area with enough chairs for everyone and the round table.
Old facilities were well maintained and in good condition.
Good location walking distance from the shops and across the public pool.
A great spot in the mountains. Facilities are brilliant
Managers were very friendly, Amenities were very clean.

Friendly and helpful office staff.
Clean and tidy grounds
Good sized level slab blocks.
This is an ideal location for visiting all areas of the Blue Mountains.  It's quiet, a kilometre to station and local shops, and across the road from a  beautiful park and pool.
Highly recommended.
Unpowered spots are small and close together. Quiet place next to the forest, nice staff.
Wonderful location with serene nature surrounds. Facilities and amenities were clean despite being slightly outdated/old. Friendly staff.

I have not stayed here (I am a resident of the Blue Mts), but at $51 per night to camp in my own tent on an unpowered patch of grass - it is an outrageous price.

I would be travelling alone.

Nice park with plenty of space to park. Nice camp kitchen with bbq outside. I have a powered en suit which is really nice and very clean. The biggest let down was comparing the pictures on Google to the actual site. The pics show a lovely pool hence the reason we booked this park. But there is no pool on this site. Its a public pool accross the road and cost 7.10 per adult and 4.50 per child. There is a childrens playground accross the rd too. 20 min walk to the main street/town.
It's a nice caravan park in a bush setting, and opposite a wonderful park and close to amazing bushwalks and the quaint village. We were in our caravan.
Been coming here for 12 years and always love staying. Pack for all seasons! You never know the weather that blue mountains may deliver!
Love the glamping... Amazing experience.
We were at the park across the road. Great for the kids.

Einer der besten Campingplätze den wir in Autralien besucht haben.
Die Toiletten und Duschen waren zu jeder Tageszeit super sauber und auch der Rest der Anlage ist bestens gepflegt. Besonders gut haben uns die vielen Kleinigkeiten wie zum Beispiel kostenloses spühlmittel un Lappen in der Küche, überall wäscheleinen usw.
Für 40$ die Nacht war es echt super wenn man sieht was man auf anderen Stellplätzen bezahlt.
Und die Lage ist auch top. 5 minutenfahrt zu vielen Wanderwegen und auch nach katoomba ist man in 10 Minuten gefahren.
A great experience. Very professionally run. Good facilities, well maintained and clean.
Very serene campground/caravan park with great amenities. Beautiful unpowered sites by a little creek.
We stayed in the tent for one night, it was nice and cosy.
Nice park let down by neglected amenities block.

Really great caravan park. Stayed a couple nights in an ensuite site with a camper, the ensuite was one of the best we’ve been in. Very clean, modern and spacious. Park itself is great, location is not too far from town and amenities.
Fabulous and clean.  We have stayed twice.

We usually prefer to camp off grid but I would like to take time to mention how great facilities were for young children and babies. They have a seperate wash room which has a toilet, small shower and two large laundry tubs great for bathing kids. They also have a plastic baby bath that can be used. This was a big win for us, as usually at caravan parks we either take them into the shower with us or just bucket bath bub.

We stayed here recently park and location is beautiful. Park very tidy.
A couple of negatives tho
The waste management bin comes to empty the skip bins which are where the caravan sites are at 5.45am and wow you are awake with that noise, surprising as the park has strict guidelines on noise from it's patrons
Get to the showers early otherwise there will be no hot water left
Site 29 tight for a 21'  caravan to reverse into due to location of skip bins
We stayed in a tent which was glamping. It was fabulous. The caravan park is beautiful and compact.  Perfect location for sightseeing and bush walking in the Blackheath area.

Hallo,
ich war 2 mal zu Gast im Blackheath Tourist/Caravan Park. Beide mal war ich sehr angetan und auch zufrieden. Bin mit der Bahn von Sydney aus angefahren, vom Bahnhof aus 10 Min. Fußweg, leicht erreichbar. Sehr freundliches Personal, guter Service, sehr schöner Standort mitten in einer Talsenke umringt von Wald.
Aber Achtung! war beide male im Frühsommer dort, am Tag Temperaturen von locker 30-35 Grad aber Nachts ist es da noch bitter kalt, wenn man wie ich im Zelt schläft.
Die Sanitärräume sind sehr sauber, die Campkitchen ist großzügig geschnitten, gut ausgestattet und sauber. Der Platz ist übersichtlich, nicht zu groß und auch schattig. Die Preise sind auch ok und bis zur Haupteinkaufsstraße, wo alle Läden sind, sind nur 5 Min. weg. Bis zum Blue Mountains National Park läuft man gerade mal 10 Min., mit dem Auto nur 2 Min. Katomba oder Blackheath, was ist besser? Naja, kenne beide Orte. Katomba ist größer, belebter und es gibt mehr Infrastruktur, Blackheath ist gemütlicher und mehr was für die Einheimischen.

We had a lovely stay at Blackheath Glen Tourist Park in our motorhome.  The staff were very helpful and friendly, and the park and facilities very clean. It was a great base to explore the magnificent Blue Mountains.  Thank you to all at  Blackheath Glen.
设施齐全，还很新，场地宽大有足够的空间，而且价格不贵。
No tv

Bij aankomst werden we vrolijk verwelkomd door John en Angela. We werden van alle informatie voorzien om naar de blue mauntains te gaan. Camping was goed onderhouden. En schoon. Verder zijn we niet veel oo de camping geweest. Zag er heerlijk groen uit!
Wonderful friendly staff and a great range of accommodation to choose from.

A holiday park with clean and well-maintained facilities. We especially enjoyed the communal kitchen during a 0-degree evening.

However, coming from their sister park in Katoomba, we missed the heating in the bathrooms.

Finally, this was probably a one-off, and we are all human. Still, we had to rearrange our evening plans to drive to the park before reception closed as a result of them not answering the phone and not returning the calls after leaving a voicemail saying that we were going to arrive after 5 pm (when reception closes). Nonetheless, the staff we interacted with upon our arrival were friendly and apologetic.
